question:
Will the price of Bitcoin be above $106,000 on November 3?

Description: This market will resolve to "Yes" if the Binance 1 minute candle for BTC/USDT 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) on the date specified in the title has a final "Close" price higher than the price specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT "Close" prices currently available at https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT with "1m" and "Candles" selected on the top bar.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

Price precision is determined by the number of decimal places in the source.

evidences.content: As a global investment manager, we offer unique, specialized content based on region and investor type. For the best experience, please select from the below: VanEck # VanEck Mid-October 2025 Bitcoin ChainCheck October 22, 2025 Read Time 10+ MIN ## Bylines Nathan Frankovitz Investment Analyst, Digital Assets ### Nathan Frankovitz Matthew Sigel Head of Digital Assets Research ### Matthew Sigel Please note that VanEck has exposure to bitcoin. Three key takeaways for mid-September – mid-October: ## Chart of the Month ### Total Bitcoin Miner Debt (USD Billions) Total Bitcoin Miner Debt (USD Billions) Total Bitcoin Miner Debt (USD Billions) [...] As of early October 2025, futures leverage sat near its 95th percentile, with the cash collateral backing Bitcoin futures at record highs (~$145B). Open interest peaked at $52B on October 6th before falling to $39B on October 10th following an 8-hour, 20% BTC drawdown, a reminder of how margin calls can cascade through the system. Notably, leverage has never sustained levels above 30% for more than 75 days, suggesting a limit on sustained risk appetite. As of mid-October, Bitcoin’s futures leverage ratio is at the 61st percentile of its hist...

evidences.content: According to him, the crypto market will enter an unprecedented bull phase during the last quarter of 2025. evidences.title: Crypto Market Trends: Bitcoin Price Forecasts and the Rise of ...
evidences.content: ## Future Outlook ### Predictions for 2025 and Beyond The future outlook for Bitcoin and the cryptocurrency market remains optimistic, with several analysts predicting significant price appreciation. According to a report by Fool.com, the price of Bitcoin could reach nearly $150,000 by 2025 in a base case scenario, driven by continued institutional investment and the approval of Bitcoin ETFs. In a bull case scenario, the price could potentially reach $1 million or more. Bernstein’s report predicts that Bitcoin will reach $200,000 in 2025, $500,000 by 2029, and $1 million by 2033, driven by further institutional adoption and ETF inflows. ### Factors Influencing Future Trends Several factors will influence future trends in the cryptocurrency market: [...] A report by broker Bernstein suggests that Bitcoin will reach a cycle high of $200,000 in 2025, $500,000 by 2029, and $1 million by 2033. evidences.title: High-frequency dynamics of Bitcoin futures
evidences.content: Under a Creative Commons license Open access ## Abstract We investigate the high-frequency dynamics of Bitcoin and Ethereum perpetual futures traded on Binance from January 2020 to December 2024. After a thorough discussion of the stylized facts and particularities of Bitcoin perpetual futures, based on previous research in futures markets, we evaluate the fit of two competing models of market microstructure: the Mixture of Distributions Hypothesis (MDH) and the Intraday Trading Invariance Hypothesis (ITIH). Using intraday data at different levels of aggregation, we investigate the relationship between return volatility per transaction and trade size. We find evidence favoring the MDH in the crypto futures market. Previous article in issue Next article in issue ## Keywords

evidences.title: Options on Bitcoin futures - Expiration Date and Strike Price
evidences.content: Additionally, CME will be listing more granular strike intervals as option expiration approaches – again allowing more precision when hedging. Additional strikes may be added based on the movement of the Bitcoin futures price. CME Group will manage the listing daily to ensure that appropriate instruments are available. ## Summary CME Group options on Bitcoin futures provide traders a variety of strikes and expirations. This enables multiple trading strategy “options” to manage bitcoin price risk or express a view on the price of bitcoin. ## Test your knowledge #### The exercise or strike price of a futures option is: The price to purchase the option. The price at which the option purchaser may buy or sell the underlying futures contract. The breakeven price of the option. [...] ## Understanding contract expirations First, let’s look at the contract expirations. CME Group will list six consecutive months of options on Bitcoin futures. Also, there will be two December options contracts. However, if the current year’s December contract is one of the front six consecutive listings – there will be only one additional December listing. Each option will expire into its underlying futur...

evidences.title: Bitcoin options expiration and market structure
evidences.content: Large Bitcoin options expirations can be significant for cryptocurrency market structure. Metrics such as max pain price and put/call ratio offer a snapshot of derivatives positioning, while the market impact may depend on hedging activity, broader sentiment, and external news flow. Such expirations highlight the growing role of crypto derivatives in price discovery and risk transfer, and participants may focus on risk management and on separating technical derivatives flows from fundamental value drivers.
